items.raw_desc: IP kamera Mercusys MC410 2K Solar KIT:The Mercusys MC410 2K Solar KIT is a complete outdoor IP camera and solar panel kit designed for long-term monitoring with minimal maintenance. The combination of solar power, built-in battery and wireless operation allows flexible installation without the constraints of a wired connection. The camera records up to 2304 × 1296 px resolution and provides a detailed overview of the surveillance area day and night. The Mercusys MC410 2K Solar KIT features colour night vision, motion and people detection, two-way audio and instant alerts to your mobile phone. Dual-band WiFi connection of 2.4GHz and 5GHz supports stable communication with the device. The camera works with Samsung's SmartThings platform as well as Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa voice control. The IP65 rating is designed for outdoor operation in a variety of weather conditions. The main reason why you should want one  is that it partially blocks light coming into the lens, allowing you to use a longer shutter speed.
